title: Information Theory
description: My learning notes from the very start of Cover and Thomas. Channel capacity, compression, Kolmogorov complexity, and entropy, and how info theory ties into electrical engineering, computer science, and physics.

title: On the Structural Sources of Prompt Injection in MCP
description: Architecture, primitives, and the four fundamental flaws that make MCP a prompt-injection minefield.

title: On Type-Theoretic Containment of Prompt Injection in MCP
description: Cryptographic identity, continuous trust, capability containment, and what dependent types can buy us against the unsolvable flaw.
